remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Expand API response vectors and attach external route transcripts through the controlled-testnet go-gate evidence bundle.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: Generated API contract inventory and an initial high-risk API response vector pack now exist; broader live response/schema vectors remain required before public beta.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Capture frontend/API capability snapshots in the controlled-testnet go-gate evidence bundle.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: Launch-disabled matrix now feeds a backend testnet capability surface and frontend helper so high-risk features remain visibly blocked; final public UX evidence remains required before public beta.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Signed artifact manifest, staged compatibility window, deterministic migration vectors, rollback semantics, and multi-node upgrade rehearsal.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: Protocol upgrade txs remain record-only. Batch hardening adds explicit record-only metadata so payloads cannot be mistaken for automatic patch/apply/migration/rollback execution.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Counsel review, jurisdiction-specific edits, public claims checklist approval.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: Non-lawyer legal/compliance posture docs now exist and are explicitly pending counsel review.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Run external multi-process adversarial validator proof with churn, equivocation, partition/rejoin, restart/replay, state sync, and incident evidence.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: Public validator/BFT proof requirements are centralized, but public multi-validator readiness is still not claimed.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.claim_boundary: Initial vectors improve reviewer evidence; they do not prove public BFT readiness, cross-client compatibility, or public beta readiness.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Run cross-machine/cross-implementation vector verification and include public reviewer fixture exports before public beta.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: An expanded v1.5 state-root vector artifact now exists with representative PoH, governance/protocol, dispute/group, and locked-economics fixtures. Public beta still needs external cross-machine/cross-implementation vector validation.

remaining_p0_p1_gaps.claim_boundary: Simulation is read-only and locked; it does not activate transfers, rewards, treasury spend, fee markets, or public token economics.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.next_gate: Expand locked simulation into adversarial reward-concentration, treasury-capture, Sybil-farming, wallet-read-model, and governance activation go/no-go evidence before any activation.
remaining_p0_p1_gaps.summary: A v1.5 tokenomics simulation artifact now exists with locked-economics truth boundaries, activation blockade checklist, and initial farming/capture scenario placeholders. Live economics remains disabled.

resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.summary: Tokenomics no longer uses per-block monetary issuance. Issuance is epoch-based with 10-minute epochs, 30 blocks per epoch at 20-second target timing, 100 WCN initial issuance, 105120 issuance epochs per halving, cap stop at 21000000 WCN, duplicate epoch protection, and locked-economics preservation.
resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.truth_boundary: Policy and locked apply behavior are implemented; live economics remains disabled until separate activation/legal/economic-governance proof.

resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.summary: Production/testnet runtime config is aligned to 20-second target block timing and no per-block block_reward config.
resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.truth_boundary: Config alignment does not by itself prove public multi-validator BFT.

resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.summary: The gap register now distinguishes initial vector/simulation artifacts from remaining public-beta proof, and PoH operator routes have explicit API contract metadata instead of static heuristic classification.
resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.truth_boundary: This improves reviewer truthfulness and route contract metadata only; it does not enable operator PoH finalization, public validators, public beta, or live economics.

resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.summary: A deterministic controlled-testnet go-gate manifest and runner now collect the final internal evidence surface for controlled testnet candidacy, including artifact freshness, B587-B594 mechanism completion, API response vectors, launch-matrix capability blockers, validator harness snapshot, and storage durability snapshot.
resolved_since_prior_evidence_map.truth_boundary: This is a go-gate evidence manifest and runner. It does not claim public beta, public validator readiness, live economics, automatic upgrades, production helper execution, public decentralized media durability, legal/compliance readiness, or mainnet readiness.

truth_boundary: Evidence/gap register for reviewer/public-readiness planning. It is not a claim of public mainnet, public validator, live economics, legal approval, or automatic upgrade readiness.
